description: LanguageTool is a grammar, spelling, and style checking service for more than 30 languages. It offers hosted proofreading APIs as well as open-source software that can be self-hosted.
summary: LanguageTool exposes two developer-facing HTTP surfaces: a Premium REST API documented by an OpenAPI spec at `api.languagetoolplus.com/v2`, authenticated with a username/email plus API key, and a separate public unauthenticated proofreading endpoint at `api.languagetool.org/v2/check`.
